mapper.insert: INSERT INTO wcs_taskinfo ( WCSTaskId, WMSTaskId, ThirdPartyTaskId, TaskType, ContainerCode, StartPosition, AGVCode, TargetPosition, TaskStatus, Progress, RcsOrTes, TaskCreaTime, TaskCompletionTime, Priority, Track ) VALUES ( #{WCSTaskId}, #{WMSTaskId}, #{ThirdPartyTaskId}, #{TaskType}, #{ContainerCode}, #{StartPosition}, #{AGVCode}, #{TargetPosition}, #{TaskStatus}, #{Progress}, #{RcsOrTes}, #{TaskCreaTime}, #{TaskCompletionTime}, #{Priority}, #{Track} )
mapper.update: UPDATE wcs_taskinfo SET WCSTaskId = #{WCSTaskId}, WMSTaskId = #{WMSTaskId}, ThirdPartyTaskId = #{ThirdPartyTaskId}, TaskType = #{TaskType}, ContainerCode = #{ContainerCode}, StartPosition = #{StartPosition}, AGVCode = #{AGVCode}, TargetPosition = #{TargetPosition}, TaskStatus = #{TaskStatus}, Progress = #{Progress}, RcsOrTes = #{RcsOrTes}, TaskCreaTime = #{TaskCreaTime}, TaskCompletionTime = #{TaskCompletionTime}, Priority = #{Priority} WHERE ThirdPartyTaskId = #{ThirdPartyTaskId}

UPDATE wcs_taskinfo SET WCSTaskId = #{WCSTaskId}, WMSTaskId = #{WMSTaskId}, ThirdPartyTaskId = #{ThirdPartyTaskId}, TaskType = #{TaskType}, ContainerCode = #{ContainerCode}, StartPosition = #{StartPosition}, AGVCode = #{AGVCode}, TargetPosition = #{TargetPosition}, TaskStatus = #{TaskStatus}, Progress = #{Progress}, RcsOrTes = #{RcsOrTes}, TaskCreaTime = #{TaskCreaTime}, TaskCompletionTime = #{TaskCompletionTime}, Priority = #{Priority} WHERE WCSTaskId = #{WCSTaskId}

UPDATE wcs_taskinfo SET WCSTaskId = #{WCSTaskId}, WMSTaskId = #{WMSTaskId}, ThirdPartyTaskId = #{ThirdPartyTaskId}, TaskType = #{TaskType}, ContainerCode = #{ContainerCode}, StartPosition = #{StartPosition}, AGVCode = #{AGVCode}, TargetPosition = #{TargetPosition}, TaskStatus = #{TaskStatus}, Progress = #{Progress}, RcsOrTes = #{RcsOrTes}, TaskCreaTime = #{TaskCreaTime}, TaskCompletionTime = #{TaskCompletionTime}, Priority = #{Priority}, Track = #{Track} WHERE WCSTaskId = #{WCSTaskId}

UPDATE wcs_taskinfo SET WCSTaskId = #{WCSTaskId}, WMSTaskId = #{WMSTaskId}, ThirdPartyTaskId = #{ThirdPartyTaskId}, TaskType = #{TaskType}, ContainerCode = #{ContainerCode}, StartPosition = #{StartPosition}, AGVCode = #{AGVCode}, TargetPosition = #{TargetPosition}, TaskStatus = #{TaskStatus}, Progress = #{Progress}, RcsOrTes = #{RcsOrTes}, TaskCreaTime = #{TaskCreaTime}, TaskCompletionTime = #{TaskCompletionTime}, Priority = #{Priority}, Track = #{Track} WHERE WCSTaskId = #{WCSTaskId}
mapper.select: SELECT DISTINCT p.* FROM wcs_taskinfo p INNER JOIN wcs_taskinfo c ON p.WCSTaskId = c.Progress WHERE c.TaskStatus = 'PENDING' AND p.TaskStatus != 'COMPLETED' ORDER BY p.Priority DESC, p.TaskCreaTime ASC
select * from wcs_taskinfo where TaskStatus=#{taskStatus} and TaskType=#{taskType} and RcsOrTes=#{rcsOrTes}
SELECT * FROM wcs_taskinfo WHERE Track IS NOT NULL AND Track != '' AND TaskStatus != 'completed' AND TaskStatus != 'pending' AND TaskType = #{taskType} AND RcsOrTes = #{rcsOrTes}
